description_long: This is a stylized, cartoonish bunny doll with a predominantly pink body and blue facial features, including a blue snout, lower jaw, and belly. The doll has two large, rounded ears, one of which is bent, and black, circular eyes with one eye patch. It features a black bow tie and black buttons on its chest, as well as a black arm, suggesting a puppet or animatronic theme. The mouth is open, revealing white teeth, and the cheeks are accented with pink spots. The overall form is plush and rounded, with articulated limbs and a playful, whimsical appearance.
description: A pink and blue cartoon bunny doll with a bent ear, black bow tie, and playful, plush features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, blue snout, open mouth, black bow tie, and both arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bent ear, blue snout, and the profile of the open mouth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, pink back and the back of the head and limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the black arm, blue snout, and the side profile of the face and ears.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll features a stylized black bow tie and two black buttons on its chest, evoking a playful, formal look reminiscent of classic animatronic or puppet costumes. No additional garments or patterns are visible.
attribute_pose: The doll is seated with its legs bent and spread apart, right arm raised and bent at the elbow, left arm resting downward, head upright with one ear bent and the other standing straight.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide, open-mouthed smile with visible teeth, round black eyes (one with a patch), and raised cheeks, giving it a cheerful and playful expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and covered in pink fabric with two large, rounded bunny ears.
